mapper.update: UPDATE tb_email_otp SET consumed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND purpose = #{purpose} AND verified_at IS NULL AND consumed_at IS NULL AND expires_at > NOW()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_email_otp ( user_id, purpose, email, otp_hash, expires_at, send_status, fail_count, resend_count, last_sent_at, request_ip, request_ua ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{purpose}, #{email}, #{otpHash}, #{expiresAt}, #{sendStatus}, #{failCount}, #{resendCount}, #{lastSentAt}, #{requestIp}, #{requestUa} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_email_otp SET send_status = #{sendStatus}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE otp_id = #{otpId}
mapper.select: SELECT otp_id, user_id, purpose, email, otp_hash, expires_at, verified_at, consumed_at, send_status, fail_count, resend_count, last_sent_at, request_ip, request_ua, verify_ip, verify_ua, created_at, updated_at FROM tb_email_otp WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND purpose = #{purpose} ORDER BY otp_id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_email_otp SET fail_count = fail_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE otp_id = #{otpId}

UPDATE tb_email_otp SET verified_at = NOW(), verify_ip = #{verifyIp}, verify_ua = #{verifyUa}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE otp_id = #{otpId} AND verified_at IS NULL AND consumed_at IS NULL AND expires_at > NOW()
UPDATE tb_email_otp SET consumed_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE otp_id = #{otpId} AND consumed_at IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_reauth_grant ( user_id, purpose, granted_by_type, source_otp_id, expires_at ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{purpose}, #{grantedByType}, #{sourceOtpId}, #{expiresAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT grant_id, user_id, purpose, granted_by_type, source_otp_id, expires_at, consumed_at, created_at FROM tb_reauth_grant WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND purpose = #{purpose} AND consumed_at IS NULL AND expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY grant_id DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT grant_id, user_id, purpose, granted_by_type, source_otp_id, expires_at, consumed_at, created_at FROM tb_reauth_grant WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND purpose = #{purpose} AND consumed_at IS NULL AND expires_at > NOW() ORDER BY grant_id DESC LIMIT 1 FOR UPDATE
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_reauth_grant SET consumed_at = NOW() WHERE grant_id = #{grantId} AND consumed_at IS NULL AND expires_at > NOW()
